items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the compatibility with memberships and one-time purchase access, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for compatibility but lacks concrete evidence of its implementation or validation. Therefore, the assessment is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence to support the requirement.
